entries.title: Three-Lane Constitutional AI Governance System: Complete Implementation Summary
Convergence Evidence Exchange Protocol
entries.description: The Convergence Evidence Exchange Protocol CEEP provides a standardized mechanism for lanes to deliver and verify evidence artifacts as part of the Autonomous Coordination Cycle ACT convergence gate. When a lane makes a claim at the convergence gate, it must provide evidence to prove the claim.

entries.title: SwarmMind: Self-Optimizing Multi-Agent AI System
entries.description: A demonstration of a self-optimizing multi-agent AI system designed for AI hackathons, showcasing explainable AI, agent collaboration, and self-improvement capabilities.

entries.title: From "Maybe System is OK" to "Absolute Truth"
entries.description: Document Purpose: This records the full progression from unverified claims to evidence-based truth. It shows every stage, every bug found, and every fix applied.

entries.title: Autonomous Cycle Test (ACT)
entries.description: Test whether a chain of lane-to-lane task suggestions can sustain itself autonomously, or at what point it requires human operator input.

entries.title: Project Brief: Library Lane in AI Governance Lattice
entries.description: This project is a Library Lane positioned within a four-lane AI governance lattice. It serves as a verification-and-enforcement lane, assisting in the evaluation of AI governance claims, and providing runtime evidence to support decision-making.

entries.title: Active Context: Library Lane - AI Governance
Product Context: Verification Surface for AI Governance
entries.description: The purpose of this project is to act as a verification surface for multi-agent AI governance claims. It provides structured evidence and auditing capabilities to evaluate claims made within the governance framework.
